text: This is a bits example: Think of it as a "short post" page — a single line, a few excerpts, or a set of photos as a lightweight photo wall. It supports common Markdown syntax: you can **bold**, *italicize*, make list items, and write . Click the **Quick note** button in the top-right corner to generate a Markdown draft, then copy/download it and paste it into the content directory.
